This sum converges because the magnitude of each term decreases exponentially.
Step 3: Distribution of U.
The limiting distribution of U is a uniform distribution on the interval [−1, 1], since the steps
Xn contribute to the value of U in a balanced way and the sum converges. Therefore, U is
uniformly distributed on [−1, 1].
